title: Yarbo 表示将删除其机器人割草机的故意后门
summary: The company behind the robot lawn mower that ran me over has changed its tune. Yarbo now plans to completely remove the remote backdoor access that could have let bad actors reprogram the robot over the internet. Yarbo customers will be able to decide whether that feature even gets installed in the first place, co-founder […]（原题：Yarbo says it will remove the intentional backdoor from its robot lawn mower）

title: RLWRLD 发布 RLDX-1，一种灵活性优先的机器人手基础模型
summary: RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack. The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands）

title: 如何为现实环境设计机器人轨道和第七轴系统
